title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-enhanced mouse pointer that understands what elements on screen it points to and contextualizes their relevance. The pointer augments the traditional 50+ year old cursor interface with new AI-powered capabilities to improve user workflows.
